meaning: n.驼峰,驼背,小园丘,峰丘v.(使)隆起,弓起
examples: Camels rebuild fat stores in their hump.
I have a massive head, a hump over my front shoulders and sharply pointed horns.
I talked to the black-faced, hump-backed doctor, and he promised to bring his friend aboard with him.
Avoiding them helped me get over the five-year hump, when more than 50% of startups shutter.
Once he was over the hump of the hill, he let the cycle glide.
